mano_cua.result_summary: 高亮遮罩与目标元素之间存在可见间距——当 padding 应为 0 时，遮罩高亮区域的矩形明显大于目标元素本身，文本与遮罩边框之间有可见的额外空白。在多个 tour step 中均观察到高亮框与目标元素之间存在多余 padding，遮罩未紧贴元素边缘。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The highlighted box around target elements shows visible space/padding between the text/element and the mask border. The white highlighted rectangle appears slightly larger than the text itself. The mask cutout encompasses the element with a visible border/frame rather than tightly hugging the element boundary as expected when padding=0.
